name: silver_dev.application.application_feature
description: The table contains data related to application features, including their start and end dates, associated application IDs, and various attributes such as amount, rate, and quantity. This data can be used to track the lifecycle of application features, analyze feature usage over time, and assess the impact of different features on applications. It also includes flags for active status and timestamps for creation, updates, and deletions.

name: silver_dev.application.application
description: The table contains data related to applications processed within the organization. It includes details such as application dates, customer information, application status, financial metrics, and scoring indicators. This data can be used for analyzing application trends, assessing customer profiles, evaluating loan performance, and understanding the overall application process.

name: silver_dev.application.reference_country
description: The table contains reference data for countries, including various identifiers and classifications. It includes details such as country codes, names (both short and long), continent, region, and ISO codes. This data can be used for applications that require country-specific information, such as localization, reporting, and data validation.
